name: Real Analysis — Differentiation
description: Derivative f'(a) = lim (f(x)-f(a))/(x-a). Chain rule, product rule. Rolle's theorem, Mean Value Theorem. Taylor expansion with remainder.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Derivative\nf' a = lim diff quot"]
    D2["Def: Differentiable\nf' exists"]
    T1["Thm: Chain rule\n(f∘g)' = f'∘g · g'"]
    T2["Thm: Product rule\nfg' = f'g + fg'"]
    T3["Thm: Rolle\nf cont diff, f a = f b ⇒ f' c = 0"]
    T4["Thm: MVT\nf b - f a = f' c b - a"]
    T5["Thm: Taylor\nf = P_n + R_n"]
    D1 --> D2
    D1 --> T1
    D1 --> T2
    D2 --> T3
    T3 --> T4
    D1 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
